subject: Add community hero image/banner to Community page
description: Biggest visual gap vs GoFundMe. Their community page has a branded hero image (Watch Duty wildfire photo) that gives the community identity. Our page is text-only above the bento grid. Add a hero banner image or gradient with community branding between the header and the bento grid. Could use one of the campaign hero images or a new community-specific image.

changes: Replaced plain text header with gradient banner (primary to sky)
Added overlapping avatar stack of top 4 leaderboard members
Active campaign count stat beside avatars
